data.body: Round-3 reviews: 6a89 PASS(signed), 4214 PASS(signed, era-anchor design). Remediated blockers: 8d8e sign_result.schema.json contract (owned in-plan); ee0b timeout=900s configurable + REBAR_OPCERT_KEY_PATH key hand-off protocol + verify-opcert dependency framing + header-vs-query-param precision; 76d2 origin-guard provisioning path (random_password->SSM->API GW static header + materialize script) + no-new-IAM-grant (existing rebar-gerrit-ssm-params-read covers /rebar/prod/*); 8f1d .signing-key stays (init consumes it), changed-vs-untouched function enumeration + dependency-gate AC. Re-running 4 reviews.
